label: Random option entry
description: A single weighted entry in a ThingSetMaker_RandomOption options list. Exactly one option is chosen at random each generation.

thingSetMaker.label: Thing set maker
thingSetMaker.description: The maker that runs when this option is selected. The Class attribute selects the concrete subclass.

weight.label: Weight
weight.description: Base selection weight for this option relative to others in the list.

weightIfPlayerHasNoItem.label: Weight if player has no item
weightIfPlayerHasNoItem.description: Replacement weight applied when the player colony does not own any item of the type specified by weightIfPlayerHasNoItemItem.

weightIfPlayerHasNoItemItem.label: Weight if player has no item - item
weightIfPlayerHasNoItemItem.description: ThingDef checked to determine whether the player weight override applies.

weightIfPlayerHasXenotype.label: Weight if player has xenotype
weightIfPlayerHasXenotype.description: Replacement weight applied when the player colony contains a pawn of the xenotype specified by weightIfPlayerHasXenotypeXenotype.

weightIfPlayerHasXenotypeXenotype.label: Weight if player has xenotype - xenotype
weightIfPlayerHasXenotypeXenotype.description: XenotypeDef checked to determine whether the xenotype weight override applies.
